sentences.english: Do you prefer taking notes by hand or typing on a laptop?
sentences.korean: 손으로 필기와 노트북 타이핑 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer taking notes by hand even though typing is faster.
sentences.korean: 타이핑이 더 빠르지만 손으로 필기하는 것을 선호해요.

sentences.english: Research shows that handwriting activates deeper cognitive processing because you have to summarize and paraphrase rather than transcribe word for word.
sentences.korean: 연구에 따르면 손글씨가 더 깊은 인지적 처리를 활성화해요. 단어 그대로 받아쓰는 대신 요약하고 바꿔 쓰기 때문이에요.

sentences.english: When I type notes in class I tend to write everything down without really thinking about it.
sentences.korean: 수업 시간에 노트를 타이핑하면 실제로 생각하지 않고 모든 걸 적는 경향이 있어요.

sentences.english: But when I write by hand I have to decide what's important and that process helps me understand the material better.
sentences.korean: 하지만 손으로 쓰면 무엇이 중요한지 결정해야 하고 그 과정이 내용을 더 잘 이해하게 해줘요.

sentences.english: Also there are no notifications or distractions when you're using just a pen and paper.
sentences.korean: 또한 펜과 종이만 사용하면 알림이나 방해가 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: News from Social Media vs. Traditional Media
Saving Money vs. Enjoying Life Now
